hero.subtitle: AI-powered suggestions for destinations you'll love, crafted for the modern wanderer.
hero.search_placeholder: Where do you want to go?

card1.title: Azure Coastlines of the Mediterranean
card1.desc: Experience the hidden coves and sapphire waters of the Amalfi Coast's best kept secrets.

card2.title: Ancient Markets of the Silk Road
card2.desc: A sensory journey through the spices, silks, and stories of historical Uzbekistan.

card3.title: Glacial Peaks and Silent Valleys
card3.desc: Escape to the serenity of the high Alps, where time moves as slowly as the glaciers.

ai.subtitle: Smart Assistant
ai.title: Tailored for your taste
ai.desc: Our AI learns from your preferences to curate the perfect escape.

card1.title: The Solo Adventurer's Path
card1.desc: Safety-focused, high-engagement solo itineraries in safe urban hubs.

card2.title: Eco-Conscious Escapes
card2.desc: Sustainable stays and low-carbon transport journeys through lush rainforests.

card1.title: The Art of Minimalist Packing: 10 Days in One Bag
card1.desc: Learn how to traverse the globe with only the essentials without sacrificing style or comfort.

card2.title: Hidden Tokyo: Beyond the Neon and Crowds
card2.desc: Discover the quiet temples and artisanal coffee shops tucked away in the world's busiest city.

about.hero_subtitle: We're not just a booking platform. We're your digital gateway to the stratosphere of luxury exploration, powered by the most sophisticated AI on the planet.

mission.title: Our Purpose
mission.p1: In an era of endless options, the true luxury is relevance. SmartTravel was founded on the belief that travel shouldn't be about scrolling through generic listings—it should be about discovering experiences that resonate with your soul.
mission.p2: Our proprietary AI engines process millions of data points, from real-time climate patterns to local cultural festivals, ensuring that every itinerary we generate is as unique as a fingerprint. We bridge the gap between human intuition and machine precision.
mission.p3: Whether you're seeking a silent retreat in the Andes or a high-energy culinary tour through Tokyo, our Digital Concierge understands the nuance of your desires before you even voice them.

team.title: The Team
team.heading: The Architects of Journey
team.subtitle: Meet the visionaries blending aerospace engineering with hospitality to redefine your transit.

cta.heading: Ready to transcend the ordinary?
cta.subtitle: Our concierge is standing by to build your next stratosphere journey. Reach out to our global support team or start your exploration today.
